data.content: Fixed getDisplayedBeatAliases: changed type to Pick<Beat, 'id' | 'aliases'>, removed prefix stripping, added deduplication against beat.id. Cross-project aliases now display in full form (e.g. proj-5678.3). Updated tests to verify cross-project alias retention and id deduplication. All quality gates pass (tests, typecheck, lint, build). Merged to main and pushed.
